name: flow
description: CSS/JS animation implementation for hover, loading, modal transitions, and gesture interactions. Use for meaningful motion, interaction feedback, or performance-safe animations.
tagline: One clear motion improvement per task.

capabilities.summary: Hover, press, toggle, validation, toast, feedback animations
Route changes, modal/panel transitions, staged content entry
Drag, swipe, snap, long press, touch feedback
prefers-reduced-motion support and accessible motion paths
Spring-based physics animations via linear() easing approximation
